entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: Short-season grain legume Phaseolus vulgaris L.

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Short-season grain legume Vigna unguiculata (L.) Walp.

entities.description: Short-season grain legume Lablab purpureus (L.) Sweet

entities.name: RESOURCE-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: Efficiency of resource use, specifically radiation (RUE)

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: Amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: GROWING PERIOD
entities.description: Duration from planting to maturity

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: Physical form and growth pattern of the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: Increase in plant biological material over time

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: Ratio of total upper leaf surface of a crop to the surface area of the land

entities.name: FRACTIONAL RADIATION INTERCEPTION
entities.description: Proportion of incoming solar radiation intercepted by the crop canopy

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: Ratio of harvested grain to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: PODSET ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The process of forming pods on the plant

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: Process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia to improve soil

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: Ability of soil to sustain plant growth

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: Ability of farming systems to withstand and recover from stress

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems managed by small-scale farmers

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Controlled trials conducted in the field to test growth and development

entities.name: CROP-MODELLING
entities.description: Use of mathematical models to simulate crop growth and yield

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Regions with low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: Number of plants per unit area

entities.name: WATER REGIMES
entities.description: Different levels of water availability including rainfed and irrigated

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate patterns

entities.name: EASTERN KENYA
entities.description: Geographic region where the study was conducted
